question: Which of the following best describes the temperature pattern in City Y during 2023?

options.A: The temperature was highest in September and lowest in January.
options.B: The temperature was highest in January and lowest in September.
options.C: The temperature remained constant throughout the year.
options.D: The temperature steadily declined over the first half of the year.

explanation: The inverted Y-axis makes it appear that the series is flipped vertically, which can swap the perceived highs and lows. The correct option matches the actual data values.
